fields.name: options
fields.description: Configuration settings for available export formats.

events.name: EXPORT_REQUESTED
events.description: Requests export of data in a specified format.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Button label
overridableConfigKeys.description: Text shown on the toolbar button that opens the export popover
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: the text on the export trigger button. user phrases: 'rename export button to X' / 'set the button label to X' / 'call the button X' / 'change export button text to X' -> X (e.g. 'Download CSV', 'Download', 'Export Data')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Export event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when the user picks a format
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: bus event name. internal wiring; users rarely target directly

overridableConfigKeys.label: Available formats
overridableConfigKeys.description: Export formats shown to the user in the popover
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: list of export format entries (csv / xlsx / pdf / png / json). user phrases: 'only CSV' -> keep only csv entry; 'add JSON' -> append json entry; 'no PNG' -> remove png; 'allow X and Y' -> set the array to those two

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tile id
overridableConfigKeys.description: Identifier of the dashboard tile being exported
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: internal identifier — host orbital wires this; users rarely set it directly
